title: A/B Testing LLM Features — GrowthBook, Statsig, and the Vibes Problem

questions.question: What is the precise distinction between evals and A/B tests in the lesson?
options: Evals answer "can the model do the job?" on a labeled set; A/B tests answer "do users care?" with live randomized traffic
Evals are user-facing; A/B tests are offline
questions.question_zh: 本课对 eval 与 A/B 测试的精确区分是什么？
options_zh: Eval 在打好标签的集合上回答“模型能不能干这件事”；A/B 测试用线上随机流量回答“用户在不在乎”
Eval 面向用户；A/B 测试是离线的

questions.question: What does CUPED do for an experiment?
options: Regresses out pre-period variance before comparing post-period, typically reducing variance 30-70% and boosting effective sample size
Increases sample size by hiring more users
questions.question_zh: CUPED 在实验中起什么作用？
options_zh: 在比较实验后周期前先回归掉前周期方差，通常把方差降低 30-70%，提升有效样本量
通过招更多用户来增加样本量

questions.question: Why do you need multiple-comparison corrections (Bonferroni or Benjamini-Hochberg) when running many A/Bs?
options: They are only needed for sequential tests
Running 20 tests at 95% confidence produces one false positive by chance; corrections control family-wise error or false discovery rate
questions.question_zh: 跑很多 A/B 时为什么需要多重比较修正（Bonferroni 或 Benjamini-Hochberg）？
options_zh: 只有 sequential 测试需要
在 95% 置信度下跑 20 个测试，期望就有一个假阳性；修正用来控制 family-wise 错误率或假发现率

questions.question: What does SRM (sample ratio mismatch) detect?
options: An assignment-hash bug producing a delivered split that diverges from the intended (e.g. 47/53 when targeting 50/50)
Memory leaks in the experiment platform
options_zh: 分配 hash 的 bug 导致实际分流偏离预期（例如目标 50/50 实际 47/53）

questions.question: Why does LLM non-determinism require buffering sample size?
options: It violates IID assumptions; effective sample size drops, so multiply required size by roughly 1.3-1.5x as a safety margin
It is irrelevant to power calculations
questions.question_zh: 为什么 LLM 的非确定性要求多留样本量？
options_zh: 它违反 IID 假设；有效样本量下降，所以把所需样本量乘上大约 1.3-1.5 倍作为安全余量
非确定性会减少所需样本
只在离线时才需要考虑

questions.question: How does the lesson contrast Statsig and GrowthBook?
options: Statsig is all-in-one SaaS (acquired by OpenAI Sept 2025, $1.1B); GrowthBook is open-source MIT, warehouse-native, with Bayesian/Frequentist/Sequential engines and CUPED/SRM/BH
questions.question_zh: 本课如何对比 Statsig 和 GrowthBook？
options_zh: Statsig 是 all-in-one SaaS（2025 年 9 月被 OpenAI 以 11 亿美元收购）；GrowthBook 是 MIT 开源、warehouse-native，提供 Bayesian/Frequentist/Sequential 引擎和 CUPED/SRM/BH
